titleStmt.title: SII 36.30: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 30. (A.R. No. 30 of 1910.) MELAṬŪR (Milaṭūr), PAPANASAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Unnatapurīśvara temple.

summary.p: (Rishabha, śu., 3, Wednesday, Punarpūsam = A.D. 1180, April 4, Wednesday.).

Gift of two plots of land measuring a little more than 4 mā, to the temple of Tiruvagattīchuramuḍaiya Mahādēva at Peru Milaṭṭūr in Kiḻāṟkūṟṟam, a subdivision of Nittaviṉōdha-vaḷanāḍu, as daṉmadānam by Tiruveṉ, a widow of Araiyaṉ Sūlapāṇi alias Vaḷavadaraiyar. It is stated that the woman, who was the second wife, looked after the children of the first wife as her own and her husband's property was divided among all the children by drawing a partition deed. The inscription ends with the signatures of several persons.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvanac cakkaravarttikaḷ [śrī] kulōttuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 2 vatu Iṣapa nāyaṟṟu pūrvapa(ṣa)ṣattu tiritiyaiyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ nittavinota vaḷanāṭṭuk kiḻāṟ kūṟṟattu perumilaṭṭūr milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ cūlapāṇiyāna vaḷavataraiya
rkkup pukka kovittakkuṭaiyāṉ makaḷ veḷāṉ peṟṟa tiruveṉ Eṉ koḻuṉtaṉ milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyan poṟkāriyāṉa vaḷa ke ṉai mutukaṇṇākak koṇṭu Ivvūril Uṭaiyār tiruvakattīcuramuṭaiya mahātevaṟku nāṉ taṉmatānam paṇṇi taṉmatānap piramāṇam kuṭu ṉ pattāviṉ Apā
vattil Ivaṟku Enakku muṉpu pukka Avarkaḷ makkaḷāy Enakkum makkaḷāy Iruṉtaṉāḷ Eṉ piḷḷaikaḷoṭu kūṟiṭṭuk kūṟṟolai Eḻuti Eḻuttiṭṭuk koṇṭa kūṟṟolaippaṭi ṉa Anupavittu varukiṟa nilaṅkaḷil Ivvūril tiripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāṉ vatikku meṟku tiyākacamuttira vāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇ
ṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu nilam Iru veliyil kīḻai veliyil teṟkaṭaiya Oru kūṟu nīkki Itan vaṭakku nila nāṉmā varaiyaraikkāṇik kīḻaraiyil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam Iraṇṭu māvum Ivvatikkuk kiḻakku Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭā
ñ catirattu kīḷkaṇmayilliṟakiṭṭu Oru kūṟu nīkki Itaṉ kiḻakku viḷai nilam Iraṇṭu māviṉ kīḻ Oṉpatu māvum Āka nilam nālu māviṉ kīḻ Oṉpatu māvum Eṉ koḻuṉtaṉ Iṉta vaḷavakoṉārai Inta nilattai nāṉ tevaṟku tānamākak kuṭukka Enakku mutukaṇpaṭaveṇum Iṉnilam tevaṟku tā
namākak kuṭukkap peṟenākil nāṉ Ātmattikāram paṇṇi marippeṉ Eṉṟu coṉnavāṟēy Ivarum cammatikka Ivarai mutukaṇṇākak koṇṭu Iṉnila nālu māviṉ kīḻ Oṉpatu māvum Ittiruvakattīcuramuṭaiya mahātevaṟku taṉmatānamākak kuṭutteṉ milaṭṭūṭuruṭaiyaāṉ Araiyaṉ cūlapāṇiyārāṉa
vaḷavataraiyarkkup pukka kovittakkuṭaiyāṉ makaḷ veḷāṉ peṟṟa tiruveṉ Ivarcolla Ittaṉmatānap piramāṇam Eḻutineṉ Ūrkkaṇakku milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ pārttacārati Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Ivaṟku mutukaṇpaṭṭeṉ milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ poṟkāriyāna vaḷavakoṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ tivākaratevanāna Irācarāca vaḷavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Irācarāca tevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ mātevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Ivai milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ tañcai nā
yakaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai milaṭṭūruṭaiyār Araiyaṉ Aracāmpāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ cūlapāṇi comatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānāṉa cempiyaṉ vaḷavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ tirunaṭṭak kūttaṉā
na Anapāya vaḷavataraiyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ [śrī*]cūlapāṇi [śrī]tattanāyakan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ milaṭṭūruṭaiyānāṉa malaikiṉiya niṉṟāṉ Amkoṇṭa valli Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Āṭkoṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ milaṭṭūṭaiyāṉ tiruvakattīcuramuṭaiyāṉ
tañcaināyakaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ tillaiviṭaṅkan tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ tillaiviṭaṅkaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ coḷa tivākaratevanāṉa tiyākacamuttiraṉ Aṇukkaneḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ cūriyatevaṉ mita nta kaṅkaṉāṉa villavan kiḻānāna veḷāneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kiraṅkuṭaiyān tillainātan Uyyavantāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ centamaṅkalamuṭaiyān celvan Āṇṭanampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku yeva milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ ti
ṭṭai ṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ milaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ
Inta māc cinnamum Innāyaṉārkku cantirātittava
ri Ucciccantikku tirumaṉtira ponakattukku kuṭuttamaikkuk
m paṭikkup piramāṇamum paṇṇik kuṭuttu Ippiramā
ppaṭi kalveṭṭuvittatu
Digital edition of SII 36.30 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
